title: Brandon’s Resume
text:
Software Engineering Major at Brigham Young University - Idaho

brandonjvanb@gmail.com | My LinkedIn page



Junior at Brigham Young University - Idaho



Programming Languages: Python, Java, C++, MySQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Java, Kotlin
Platforms and Frameworks: Jupyter, MongoDB, Kubernetes, Flask, Docker
Experienced with managing projects with Git





Software development
Full stack development





Jan 2021 – Dec 2027 Brigham Young University - Idaho



2018 Participant, Lockheed Martin Deer Creek, Littleton, CO Qualified and participated for Code Quest 2018 hosted by Lockheed Martin
2013-2018 Participant, Colorado TSA, Denver, CO Competed in the Colorado State Technology Student Association (TSA) competition for five years
2018 Eagle Scout, Boy Scouts of America, Parker, CO Earned the Eagle Scout from the Boy Scouts of America



Mar 2023 - Sept 2023, Apr 2024 - Aug 2024, Apr 2025 - Aug 2025 ICR, Inc, Aurora

Software Engineer Intern
Learned and expanded upon an existing codebase to store open-source data from a series of websites. This data was then used for data analytics.
Created custom python scripts tuned for extracting open source data.
Rebuilt Grafana dashboards to display the data for administrative use.

title: about me
text:
Passionate about coding since high school, I’ve immersed myself in the world of programming, developing a solid foundation in Python, C++, Java, HTML, and a touch of JavaScript and CSS. I thrive on creating innovative applications and scripts that simplify everyday tasks, making life easier, faster, and more accessible. Driven by a curiosity to learn and a desire to create, I am eager to continue developing impactful software solutions and exploring new technologies. Whether it’s developing user-friendly applications or teaching coding concepts, I am dedicated to making a difference in the tech world.
